prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOWRCDPO-5X5X5-ORNG Product Type: BACKPACK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Water Resistant Collapsible Day Pack - Orange Description: The ASR Outdoor Water Resistant Collapsible Bag is the super lightweight day pack that won't weigh down your on-the-go lifestyle.

This day pack is ultra-lightweight and is constructed out of water-resistant 190T polyester. Comes with zipper closures to secure your belongings up and can hold up to 10Ibs. The bag when in use measures 17" x 11" x 5.5". Collapsing this bag into its inner pocket converts it into a compact size that measures 5" x 5", making this day pack an excellent addition to any travel pack or emergency kit.

The Water Resistant Collapsible Day Bag is great for travel, hiking, or just the daily commute. Search Terms: compact travel hiking day-pack backpack rucksack bag zip-up folding bug-out bright light-weight rip-stop nylon durable breathable comfortable padded strap pocket water resistant packable camping outdoor trail foldable portable ultralight handy small Features: - Ultra Lightweight Day Pack - Holds up to 10Ibs. - Material: Water Resistant Nylon - Color: Orange - Backpack Dimensions: 17" x 11" 5.5" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Orange Water Resistant Collapsible Day Pack

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Orange Water Resistant Collapsible Day Pack

anthropic.title_differentiation: Ultra Lightweight, Holds 10Lbs, Folds To 5" X 5", Water Resistant Nylon, Travel And Hiking

openai.title_differentiation: Ultra Lightweight, Water Resistant 190T Polyester, Packs To 5" X 5", Holds Up To 10 Lbs, Travel And Hiking Ready
